form.formComment: Well supported last time and ran up to expectations, burning early to score a 4 length win at this track over 350m in 19.50. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well supported last time and ran up to expectations, burning early to score a 4 length win at this track over 350m in 19.50. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 3/4 at Bulli and clocking a brilliant 19.12 for the 340m trip. Can measure up again if runs up to recent best times.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 3/4 at Bulli and clocking a brilliant 19.12 for the 340m trip. Can measure up again if runs up to recent best times.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at his last run before a break of five months when sixth at Bulli over 472m. Looks tested despite the low draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings at his last run before a break of five months when sixth at Bulli over 472m. Looks tested despite the low draw.

form.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 4 length second but did record an outstanding 19.76 for the 350m trip. Expecting another bold showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 4 length second but did record an outstanding 19.76 for the 350m trip. Expecting another bold showing.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh on April 7 over 340m at Bulli behind Gus And Glory, beaten 6 lengths (19.55) in a NG. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh on April 7 over 340m at Bulli behind Gus And Glory, beaten 6 lengths (19.55) in a NG. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Dubbo to win by 2 lengths in 18.18, beating Cindy's Secret. Last start finished 4th on March 25 over 330m at Temora behind Peppa's Daughter beaten 4 lengths (18.98) in a Mix 1/2/3. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Dubbo to win by 2 lengths in 18.18, beating Cindy's Secret. Last start finished 4th on March 25 over 330m at Temora behind Peppa's Daughter beaten 4 lengths (18.98) in a Mix 1/2/3. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 2 lengths over 318m at Dubbo in a handy (18.10), beating Let's Go Jude. Boasts a course and distance PB in a dazzling 19.51. Must include.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 2 lengths over 318m at Dubbo in a handy (18.10), beating Let's Go Jude. Boasts a course and distance PB in a dazzling 19.51. Must include.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Changed stride over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional, going on to clock 22.38 in a 2 length win at Bulli over 400m. Has claims if at his best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional, going on to clock 22.38 in a 2 length win at Bulli over 400m. Has claims if at his best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels entering first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 365m at Nowra. That followed a win two back in 20.58 beating Zipping Augusta over 365m at Nowra. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 365m at Nowra. That followed a win two back in 20.58 beating Zipping Augusta over 365m at Nowra. Hard to envisage a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the home straight and again approaching the finish.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a NG on April 7 over 340m at Bulli behind Gus And Glory beaten 4.5 lengths (19.41). Rates highly and looks tough to beat.
